theme: Light Mode Base (with Dark Mode toggle)
archetype: Archetype 3 (Pastel & Soft) infused with Neo-Brutalist contrast
design_philosophy: E1 Anti-AI Designer Protocol: Fusion of brutalist raw honesty with neobrutalist playfulness. Rejects generic chat UI for high-contrast, thick-outlined pastel aesthetics.

headings.usage: Use for App Name, Empty State Titles, and Sidebar Headers. Prohibited: Inter.

body.usage: Use for chat bubbles, input fields, timestamps, and general text to give a structured, raw terminal feel.

colors.rules: Never use pure #000000 or #808080. Hard black borders (2px to 4px) are mandatory for neo-brutalist feel. Use pastel fills with stark contrast.

spacing_and_layout.grid_system: The 'Control Room' Grid layout modified for Chat. 12-column base.
spacing_and_layout.spacing_scale: Generous Spacing: p-4 for chat bubbles, p-6 for containers. Grid gaps should be tight (gap-0) to emphasize borders.
spacing_and_layout.radius: rounded-none or max rounded-md (4px) for a harsh, boxy feel, contrasting with the soft colors.

surfaces_and_borders.chat_bubbles: 2px solid black border, pastel fill, offset shadow (e.g. shadow-[4px_4px_0px_0px_rgba(0,0,0,1)]) for Neo-Brutalist tactility.
surfaces_and_borders.input_bar: Fixed at bottom, oversized input field with monospace font. Send button is a thick-bordered square or circle.
surfaces_and_borders.hover_states: -translate-y-1 with increased offset shadow. Always explicitly set text color.

components_strategy.forms_and_inputs: Use Shadcn customized heavily. Strip rounded corners, add 2px black border, solid color focus rings (ring-2 ring-black).
components_strategy.buttons: Neo-brutalist buttons: bg-pastel text-black border-2 border-black shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#0A0A0A] active:shadow-none active:translate-x-[4px] active:translate-y-[4px].
components_strategy.reactions: Popovers must have harsh borders and no blur (solid background) to maintain the brutalist identity.
components_strategy.stories_status: Top of sidebar. Avatars in squares instead of circles, with 2px solid pastel borders indicating unseen status.

motion.philosophy: Micro-interactions that feel mechanical and snappy.
motion.hover: Instant or very fast (100ms) border/shadow transitions.

backgrounds.description: Abstract colorful gradient swirl for empty states or chat thread bg

instructions_to_main_agent: DO NOT use Inter or generic default templates. Implement Cabinet Grotesk for headings and IBM Plex Mono for chat text/body.
Implement the UI strictly with Neo-Brutalist aesthetics: 2px black borders on containers, hard shadows (e.g., shadow-[4px_4px_0px_#000]), and pastel backgrounds.
Ensure dark mode is supported. Flip borders and shadows to #FDFBF7 when in dark mode, maintaining the harsh contrast.
For the requested 'all features' (reactions, read receipts, voice notes), build them as distinct brutalist elements (e.g. square reaction pills with outlines).
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes for testing.
Use Phosphor Icons or Iconoir to match the bold line-art aesthetic.
Never use placeholder URLs for images; only use the provided media URLs.
